channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Honkai: Nexus Anima ‘Evolution Test’ starts July 9
item.description: miHoYo announces the ‘Evolution Test’ for Honkai: Nexus Anima, launching July 9 on PC, iOS, and Android. No end date has been specified yet.

item.title: Rose & Camellia Collection adds Online Battle Mode
item.description: The online battle mode update for Rose & Camellia Collection launched on June 22, enhancing gameplay with competitive features. Players can now battle online.

item.title: This Week’s Japanese Game Releases: Star Fox, Villion: Code
item.description: Star Fox for Switch 2 and Villion: Code for multiple platforms highlight this week's Japanese game releases. Exciting titles are set to launch soon.

item.title: Zelda: Tears Of The Kingdom DLC for 40th Anniversary
item.description: Nintendo announces new DLC for The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom, celebrating the franchise's 40th anniversary. Fans can expect exciting new content.

item.title: iPhone Air 2 may face hardware downgrade
item.description: Rumors suggest the iPhone Air 2 could undergo a hardware downgrade, potentially jeopardizing Apple's flagship design future. Concerns arise over performance.

item.title: Insomniac’s Wolverine actor joins GTA 6 cast
item.description: The voice actor for Sabretooth in Marvel's Wolverine is confirmed to be part of the Grand Theft Auto 6 cast, adding star power to the game.

item.title: Apple’s design focus may shift under Ternus
item.description: New reports indicate that Apple’s incoming CEO John Ternus aims to revive bold design elements reminiscent of earlier products. A significant shift is anticipated.

item.title: AirPods Pro 3 hit record low price
item.description: AirPods Pro 3 are now available for $169, a record low ahead of Prime Day. This price drop offers significant savings for consumers.

item.title: How to Improve Your Grip Strength
item.description: Experts share tips on enhancing grip strength, crucial for gym performance and daily activities. Improving grip can lead to better overall fitness.

item.title: Exploring Blue Prince’s Spiral of Stars
item.description: A deep dive into the narrative of Blue Prince, exploring its complex themes and character arcs. Spoilers included for a comprehensive understanding.
